ALEX JOHNSON
Backend Engineer | Manchester

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Backend specialist with 4 years experience building scalable APIs and data pipelines.
Strong in Python and DevOps tooling. Some cloud experience.

EXPERIENCE

Backend Engineer — DataSystems Ltd (2022–present)
- Developed Python microservices for data processing pipelines
- Built REST APIs using Flask and FastAPI
- Deployed applications to AWS EC2 and RDS
- Used Docker for containerization and local development
- Collaborated with frontend teams on API specifications

Junior Backend Engineer — ConsultancyPro (2020–2022)
- Wrote Python scripts for ETL jobs
- Maintained legacy Java monolith (JCIP concurrency patterns)
- Set up basic Docker containers for development
- Basic SQL tuning and database maintenance

SKILLS
Languages: Python, Java, SQL, Bash
Frameworks: Flask, FastAPI, Spring
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL
Containerization: Docker
Cloud: AWS (EC2, RDS)
Tools: Git, Linux, Apache, nginx

CERTIFICATIONS
Python Programming - Advanced (2021)

EDUCATION
BSc Software Engineering, University of Leeds (2020)
